description.content: Operations for listing and retrieving build artifacts including compiled binaries, test results, and other published output files.

Operations for creating, listing, retrieving, and updating build pipeline definitions that specify how builds are executed.

Operations for queuing, listing, retrieving, and updating builds including filtering by status, result, branch, and definition.

Returns a list of builds matching the specified filter criteria. Supports filtering by definition, status, result, branch, repository, time range, and tags. Results are paginated and can be ordered by queue time, start time, or finish time.

query.description: (Required) Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.
Comma-delimited list of definition IDs to filter by
Comma-delimited list of queue IDs to filter by
Filter by build number. Append asterisk for prefix matching.
Filter to builds after this date based on the query order
Filter to builds before this date based on the query order
Filter to builds requested by this user
Filter by the reason the build was created
Filter by current build status
Filter by build result
Comma-delimited list of tags to filter by
Maximum number of builds to return
Continuation token for paginated results
Maximum number of builds to return per definition
Filter for deleted builds
Sort order for the results
Filter to builds from this branch
Comma-delimited list of build IDs to retrieve
Filter to builds from this repository
Filter to builds from repositories of this type

REST API for managing build definitions, queuing builds, and retrieving build results, artifacts, tags, and logs in Azure DevOps. Supports the full lifecycle of continuous integration builds including creating and updating build definitions, listing and filtering builds by status and result, tagging builds for identification, and downloading build artifacts.

Contact Support:
 Name: Microsoft Azure DevOps
